display.purpose: Splash screens and marketing surfaces only. Not used in the main app shell.

headline.purpose: Page-level titles on auth screens. Rare in the main app.

title.purpose: Dominant heading for pantry, recipe, and list page headers. DM Sans.

body-large.purpose: Emphasized body content and button labels. Inter semibold.

body.purpose: Default form input text and descriptions. Always 16px in interactive fields.

body-small.purpose: The workhorse: list item names, ingredient names, most list content.

label.purpose: Form field labels and metadata. Inter semibold.

badge.purpose: Status chips, category labels, tab bar labels.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Segment control active segment. Barely perceptible lift.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Cards and chips with mild elevation.

shadows.name: lift
shadows.purpose: Bottom sheets. The highest elevation in the system.

motion.name: press
motion.purpose: Active/press state on all interactive elements. Applied via transition-transform.

breakpoints.name: mobile-only
breakpoints.value: Capacitor iOS native app. No responsive breakpoints. Layout is always single-column, full-viewport.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action trigger. Used for form submission, confirmation, and primary CTAs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; background: #5CA547; color: #FFFFFF; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #3D7A30; transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #D8DDD3; color: #9BA395; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. White fill with border. Used alongside primary for cancel/confirm pairs.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #2E3529; border: 1px solid #D8DDD3; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: #F8FAF4; transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field. 16px font size is locked to prevent iOS auto-zoom.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #2E3529; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; background: #FFFFFF; color: #2E3529; border: 1px solid #D8DDD3; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #9BA395; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #5CA547; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Content filter tab. Full-pill shape distinguishes it from buttons. Used in Pantry and Recipes.
components.css: .ds-chip-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 36px; padding: 0 16px; background: #EEF1EA; color: #5C6358; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-chip:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-chip--active { background: #5CA547; color: #FFFFFF; }

components.name: Segment Control
components.description: Top-level page switcher. Used for Mine/Explore toggle on Recipes page.
components.css: .ds-segment { display: flex; padding: 4px; background: #EEF1EA; border-radius: 12px; } .ds-segment__item { flex: 1; padding: 8px 16px; background: transparent; color: #5C6358; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-segment__item:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-segment__item--active { background: #FFFFFF; color: #2E3529; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Inline status indicator for member roles, recipe availability, ingredient states. Always pill-shaped.
components.html: OwnerMissing 2No stock
components.css: .ds-badge-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; height: 24px; padding: 0 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; } .ds-badge--green { background: #C5E3BC; color: #3D7A30; } .ds-badge--warning { background: #FEF9E7; color: #D4A017; } .ds-badge--danger { background: #FEF0EF; color: #E03B36; } .ds-badge--neutral { background: #EEF1EA; color: #5C6358; }

components.name: Bottom Sheet
components.description: The primary modal surface. Slides up from the bottom for transient actions: add item, edit quantity, add member.
components.html:
Add Item

Sheet content goes here.
components.css: .ds-sheet { background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 20px 20px 0 0; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); max-height: 90vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; } .ds-sheet__handle { width: 40px; height: 4px; background: #D8DDD3; border-radius: 9999px; margin: 12px auto 0; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-sheet__title { padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid #EEF1EA; font-family: DM Sans, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #1A2E1A; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-sheet__body { padding: 16px; overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; }

components.name: Tab Bar
components.description: Bottom navigation. Four tabs: List, Pantry, Recipes, Profile. Extends below safe area inset.
components.css: .ds-tabbar { display: flex; border-top: 1px solid #EEF1EA; background: #FFFFFF; } .ds-tab { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 2px; min-height: 56px; background: none; border: none; color: #9BA395; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-tab:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-tab--active { color: #5CA547; } .ds-tab__label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; }

components.name: Page Header
components.description: Signature component. Every app page uses this fixed header structure. The outer wrapper extends behind the iOS status bar.
components.css: .ds-header-outer { flex-shrink: 0; background: #FFFFFF; border-bottom: 1px solid #EEF1EA; padding-top: env(safe-area-inset-top, 0px); } .ds-header-inner { display: flex; align-items: center; height: 80px; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-header-back { width: 40px; height: 40px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 12px; background: none; border: none; color: #2E3529; cursor: pointer; margin-left: -4px; transition: transform 0.15s; } .ds-header-back:active { transform: scale(0.95); background: #EEF1EA; } .ds-header-title { flex: 1; margin: 0 12px; font-family: DM Sans, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #1A2E1A; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-header-action { width: 40px; height: 40px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; border-radius: 12px; background: none; border: none; color: #5C6358; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.15s; } .ds-header-action:active { transform: scale(0.95); background: #EEF1EA; }

narrative.overview:
Fridgy is a domestic tool, used in kitchens and grocery aisles by people who cook for their households. The interface should feel the way a good handwritten receipt looks: clean ruled structure, ink that doesn't bleed, just enough warmth from the paper to feel organic rather than clinical. It is not a tech product. It is not a commerce platform. It is the thing that helps you know what you have.

The dominant color in the neutral palette is not gray: it's a cultivated, pressed-leaf green, subtly tinting every surface from the app canvas (#F8FAF4) to the deepest text (#1A2E1A). The tint is quiet but pervasive, and it makes the interface feel alive in a way no gray-based system can. The single saturated accent, a clear earthy green (#5CA547), earns its presence precisely because everything around it holds back.

Density is low. Information appears when it's needed, not to impress. The app is used one-handed in a bright supermarket, or standing at the counter before dinner. Speed of comprehension is the metric, not feature visibility.
keyCharacteristics: Pressed-leaf green tints every neutral; no pure grays anywhere
Single green accent; all other color is status-semantic (warning yellow, danger red)
DM Sans for all headings, Inter for all body: the split is absolute
Flat surfaces by default; shadows reserved for floating layers only
Rounded-md (12px) as the universal shape; rounder only for pills and bottom sheets
Phosphor icons in regular weight at rest, fill on active

rules.name: The Pressed Leaf Rule
rules.body: No pure grays, ever. Every neutral is tinted toward #1A2E1A (hue ~134). If a color reads as gray under any ambient light, it's wrong.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: #5CA547 (Field Green) is the only saturated color that appears outside of semantic status contexts. It occupies at most 10% of any given screen.

rules.name: The Hard Split Rule
rules.body: DM Sans is for headings (structural identity). Inter is for data (content). Mixing them within a single text hierarchy level is prohibited.

rules.name: The 16px Floor Rule
rules.body: All input and form text is forced to 16px to prevent iOS auto-zoom. Never override this for interactive fields.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A list item has no shadow. A card in a scrollable feed has no shadow. A page header has no shadow. Reach for a shadow only when the element genuinely floats.

dos: Do use Field Green (#5CA547) exclusively for primary actions, active states, and positive status.
Do tint every neutral toward green. #1A2E1A is the dark anchor; use #F8FAF4 (not white) as the app canvas.
Do use DM Sans for all structural headings and Inter for all body/data text.
Do keep surfaces flat at rest. Apply shadows only to floating layers.
Do use Phosphor icons in regular weight by default, fill weight only when active or selected.
Do lock all input font-size to 16px to prevent iOS auto-zoom.
Do use rounded-md (12px) for all interactive controls. Use rounded-full only for filter chips and badges.
Do make all tap targets a minimum 40x40px.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS patterns: purple or blue accent colors, gradient fills, hero metric dashboards.
Don't use meal-kit or commerce energy: loud photography overlays, promotional urgency, heavy CTA stacking.
Don't use fitness app patterns: calorie bars, streak indicators, clinical white-and-green with judgment metrics.
Don't add a side-stripe colored border to any list item, card, or callout.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). Emphasis is weight and size only.
Don't use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF. The darkest text is #1A2E1A.
Don't add DM Sans to body copy paragraphs or data fields.
Don't animate layout properties. Transitions are transform and opacity only.
